## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX AI and Hasura for organic growth and SEO strategy for PromQL.io](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hasura pivoting focus from GraphQL to PromQL, aiming to boost organic traffic and backlink profile](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [GrowthX AI offers AI-driven content creation and SEO strategy, with a two-phase approach: strategy sprint (6-8 weeks) and execution (12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Kailash seeks comprehensive organic growth support, including content creation, backlink building, and innovative SEO tactics](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

## Topics

### Hasura's Strategic Shift

  - [Pivoted from GraphQL (Hasura.io) to PromQL and DDN (advanced API)](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [PromQL.io current Ahrefs backlink profile: 11 (vs. Hasura.io: 76)](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Goal: Increase PromQL.io backlink profile to 50+ in next few quarters](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Focus on improving organic backlinks, traffic, and search rankings](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

### Content Strategy and Challenges

  - [Product marketing team expanding, hiring for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Plans for regular blog posts, deep dives, and case studies](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Company-wide contribution to content creation encouraged](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Need for top-of-funnel (TOFU) content identified](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

### GrowthX AI's Approach

  - [Two-phase engagement: Strategy Sprint (6-8 weeks) and Execution (12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [AI-driven workflows with human oversight for rapid, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Careful scaling approach for low domain authority sites](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Success story: Taking brands from no content to 100+ daily clicks in 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

### Innovative Content Ideas

  - [Interactive demo pages (e.g., Vappy's voice agent demo)](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Connector-specific landing pages for PromQL](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Personalized use case generator for PromQL (currently in staging)](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)

### SEO and Backlinking

  - [GrowthX AI offers backlinking services and partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Natural backlink growth through high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Example: Client grew from 0 to 192 referring domains without active link building](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Content Planning and Collaboration

  - [Use of Content OS (Airtable) for keyword research and content planning](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Collaborative approach to refine topics and align with go-to-market strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ajpm64iY_xz2bbr_vaKhJS-qkoPwAFzQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
